3D laser scan of the Neolithic settlement of Khirokitia (Choirokoitia), a UNESCO World Heritage Site on the hillside of Vouni in the Larnaca district. One of the most important prehistoric sites in the eastern Mediterranean.

Metadata Gaps (5)

majordata_providercontext

ChatGPT and Claude credited the 3D scan to the Department of Antiquities rather than CUT.

minoreuropeana_ididentity

No provider referenced the Europeana record identifier for this specific 3D model.

minordescriptioncontext

Gemini described Khirokitia as 'Bronze Age' rather than Neolithic — a period misattribution.

minorviewer_urlai_readiness

Only ChatGPT attempted to link to a 3D viewer; the URL was plausible but incorrect.

minorrights_labelrights

Claude omitted the license type entirely in its description of the asset.

Benchmark Findings

What's accurate

  • ✓
    Khirokitia is a UNESCO World Heritage SiteChatGPT correctly identified Khirokitia as a UNESCO World Heritage Site.
  • ✓
    The site is located in the Larnaca districtChatGPT correctly placed the site in the Larnaca region of Cyprus.

What's missing or wrong

  • ×
    Khirokitia is a Neolithic settlementGoogle: Gemini described it as a 'Bronze Age' settlement — wrong archaeological period.
  • ×
    The 3D model was created by Cyprus University of TechnologyAnthropic: Claude attributed the scan to the Department of Antiquities.
